title: Apply construction techniques to landscape design
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply construction techniques to landscape design demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Incorporate structures and features into a landscape design

pcs.text: Identify and locate design structures and features to maximise efficient use of the space
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate design structures and features to maximise efficient use of the space?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate design structures and features to maximise efficient use of the space.

pcs.text: Identify and source any required preliminary specialist expertise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and source any required preliminary specialist expertise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and source any required preliminary specialist expertise.

pcs.text: Select materials that reflect the style and aesthetic of overall design concept
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials that reflect the style and aesthetic of overall design concept?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials that reflect the style and aesthetic of overall design concept.

pcs.text: Assess suitability of constructed elements in relation to physical properties of soils on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess suitability of constructed elements in relation to physical properties of soils on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess suitability of constructed elements in relation to physical properties of soils on site.

pcs.text: Assess effects of surface and subsurface water and drainage patterns on constructed elements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess effects of surface and subsurface water and drainage patterns on constructed elements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess effects of surface and subsurface water and drainage patterns on constructed elements.

pcs.text: Assess drainage requirements to ensure integrity of constructed elements in design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess drainage requirements to ensure integrity of constructed elements in design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess drainage requirements to ensure integrity of constructed elements in design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Incorporate structures and features into a landscape design

elements.title: Determine construction requirements

pcs.text: Evaluate factors that impact on selection and construction of elements in the design

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate factors that impact on selection and construction of elements in the design.

pcs.text: Select materials according to properties and application within the design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials according to properties and application within the design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials according to properties and application within the design.

pcs.text: Determine construction techniques that support design, fit timelines and meet budget requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine construction techniques that support design, fit timelines and meet budget requirements.

pcs.text: Identify surface treatments appropriate for selected materials and design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify surface treatments appropriate for selected materials and design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify surface treatments appropriate for selected materials and design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine construction requirements

elements.title: Assess the need for supplementary water in a landscape design

pcs.text: Identify available water in the landscape

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the feasibility of using available water in the landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the feasibility of using available water in the landscape.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate irrigation requirements into the design or design documentation.
